title: Reproducing S3-FIFO: FIFO Queues Are All You Need for Cache Evictions
short_description: A Chameleon bare metal artifact that reproduces the SOSP'23 S3-FIFO cache-eviction result by simulating LRU, LFU, ARC, LeCaR, and S3-FIFO on 100 CloudPhysics traces with libCacheSim.
long_description: This artifact provisions a Chameleon bare metal node, builds the libCacheSim cache simulator, downloads 100 CloudPhysics block-I/O traces from the open cacheMon/cache_dataset corpus, and simulates five cache-eviction algorithms (LRU, LFU, ARC, LeCaR, S3-FIFO) at three cache sizes. The Analysis notebook plots the miss-ratio comparison, reproducing the central finding of the SOSP'23 paper 'FIFO queues are all you need for cache evictions' (Yang et al.): S3-FIFO achieves lower miss ratios than both classic and state-of-the-art eviction policies.
